mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (NOTICE_NO, TITLE, CONTENT) VALUES (NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT NOTICE_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, REG_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC, REG_DATE DESC) AS RN FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO > 0 ) WHERE RN > #{pageStart} AND RN <= (#{pageStart} + #{sizePerPage})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO > 0
SELECT NOTICE_NO, TITLE, CONTENT, REG_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
